_doc: Compounding source list. The daily curator agent reads this each run and may append to discovered_pending. Promote venues from discovered_pending into priority_a/b only after they've shown up in at least 3 daily logs with quality events. Edit this file directly to add or retire sources. priority_a/b + instagram_handles + competitor_harvest feed the CORE conscious tier; discovery_sources feed the DISCOVERY tier (event_tier='discovery') — festivals/galleries/markets/food/performance, first-party only, greater-Ubud only. See curator/playbook.md 'Discovery tier'.

priority_a.name: Yoga Barn — events calendar
priority_a.note: Filter their events page for ecstatic dance, cacao, sound — skip pure yoga classes.

priority_a.name: Paradiso Ubud — events
priority_a.note: Skip the cinema schedule — only the ecstatic dance / live music slots. Note: Thursday nights run multiple overlapping series (Vibración, Resonanz, Dance Temple) — treat as a family of events; admin should clarify which Megatix slugs are live. Tuesday 18:00 Dissolve :: Eros is a separate contact-dance event from Moving Waves 15:00.

priority_a.name: Sanctuary Ubud
priority_a.note: Tantra intensives and embodied workshops. Their site sometimes hides dates inside booking flows — follow through if needed. No indexed web presence found for June/July 2026 — check Instagram before assuming no events.

priority_a.name: Blossom Space Ubud
priority_a.note: Tantra, conscious sexuality, embodied dance. New venue, growing programme. Note: no indexed web presence found as of May 2026 — may be operating primarily via Instagram/WhatsApp. Verify the venue name spelling before each run.

priority_a.name: Pyramids of Chi
priority_a.note: Sound healing — gong, bowl, breath journeys. Own ticketing system. Two distinct tiers: (1) daily tourist sessions 350k IDR — reject; (2) monthly community ceremonies (Full Moon, Into the Heart Cacao, solstice specials) — ingest. Into the Heart Cacao date only available on full-calendar page (403 blocked); contact events@pyramidsofchi.com if needed.

priority_a.name: Dragonfly Village Ubud
priority_a.note: Newer venue, IG-first publishing. High signal-to-noise for our themes.

priority_a.name: Alchemy Yoga & Meditation Center (AYMC)
priority_a.note: Rice-field setting in Sayan. Hosts weekly RISE Ecstatic Dance (Tue 7-9pm), monthly Full Moon Bhakti celebrations with Jeremy Sol, and Kim Kindersley ceremonial breathwork (recurring Fridays, IDR 225k). Strong community anchor. Promoted from discovered_pending 2026-05-31 (3 qualifying logs: May 19, May 23, May 26). Instagram: @alchemyyogacenterubud. Weekly RISE and Solstice Kirtan Jun 21 already in DB — scan for new specials.

priority_b.name: Lu.ma — Ubud discovery
priority_b.note: Growing fast among digital-nomad-adjacent organisers in Ubud. Filter by date window today → +60 days.

priority_b.name: Eventbrite — Ubud dance/tantra search
priority_b.note: Public listings — no API key required for read. Also search 'tantra', 'ecstatic'.

priority_b.name: Megatix — Bali (existing DB source)
priority_b.note: Query the events table for source.slug='megatix' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '36 hours' to surface new entries the existing adapter pulled. Re-tag if they fit our themes but were mis-categorised.

priority_b.name: Dragon Tea Temple
priority_b.note: Jl. Penestanan No.8, Sayan, Ubud. Candlelit ceremonial garden. Monthly New Moon Kirtan & Sacred Tea + Full Moon Kirtan (Bhakti Bliss Bali / Jeremy Sol) — format: kirtan + sacred tea + ecstatic dance by fire + cosmic sound healing. Also hosts Kintsugi (Tuluvi Arts) and annual MAGDALENA ceremony (Jul 22). Tickets via Megatix. Promoted from discovered_pending 2026-05-24 (3 qualifying logs: May 20, May 21, May 24). Linktree: linktr.ee/dragonteatemple.

priority_b.name: Heart Space Bali
priority_b.note: Central Ubud ceremony studio (Jl. Nyuh Kuning No. 1). Weekly Friday 7 PM (cacao + Balinese ritual + sacred sound) and Sunday 7 PM (cacao + restorative movement + sound). Primary offering is ceremonial — not a yoga studio. Promoted from discovered_pending 2026-05-25 (3 qualifying logs: May 21, May 22, May 25).

priority_b.name: Mudra Cafe (The Cobra Room)
priority_b.note: Restaurant/café at Jl. Goutama Selatan No. 22, central Ubud. Intimate event space 'The Cobra Room' hosts the weekly Thursday 'Shakti Bhakti: Kirtan & Cacao' (18:00) led by Anu Karoliina, plus 'The Red Tent' bi-weekly Friday women's circle (no confirmed facilitator yet). Promoted from discovered_pending 2026-05-31 (2 curator logs May 28+29 + web-confirmed live weekly, approved 2026-05-31). Megatix posts dated per-edition slugs that rot weekly (mudra-kirtan + kirtanwithanu both return 'already taken place') — do NOT trust those as ticket CTAs; the recurring card runs without one.

discovery_sources.name: Ubud Food Festival
discovery_sources.note: Annual, late May, Taman Kuliner. INGEST AS ONE PARENT CARD pointing at the official programme — never a card per dinner/masterclass. Theme + dates announced ~6-8 weeks out. 2026 edition (28-31 May) already passed.

discovery_sources.name: Ubud Writers & Readers Festival (UWRF)
discovery_sources.note: Annual, late Oct, across Ubud venues. ONE PARENT CARD — 100+ sessions roll into the single festival event. Free art-exhibition openings can be distinct events if separately RSVP'd. Already seeded 2026 (21-25 Oct).

discovery_sources.name: Ubud Open Studios
discovery_sources.note: Annual, early June, 60+ studios across Ubud + Gianyar. Self-guided crawl = one parent card; Art Talks programme can be separate if separately ticketed. Already seeded 2026 (5-7 Jun, spotlight).

discovery_sources.name: Ubud Village Jazz Festival
discovery_sources.note: Annual, early Aug, Sthala (Wos River, Ubud). One parent card. Lineup + Megatix early-bird announced Apr-Jun. Already seeded 2026 (7-8 Aug).

discovery_sources.name: Ubud Folk Festival
discovery_sources.note: Annual, ~April, Biji World (Mas, greater-Ubud). Folk/indie/world music + live art + vinyl market. One parent card.

discovery_sources.name: Komaneka Fine Art Gallery
discovery_sources.note: Monkey Forest Rd, Ubud. 4-6 short-run exhibitions/year + vernissages. Opening nights are one-off discovery events (often the only time the artist is present). First-party site posts full curatorial text + dates.

discovery_sources.name: Titik Dua / W Barwa Gallery
discovery_sources.note: Peliatan (greater-Ubud). Highest-reach Ubud gallery IG (~25k). Monthly exhibitions + artist talks + book launches. Strongest single signal for openings in the design/architecture-adjacent space.

discovery_sources.name: Tonyraka Art Gallery
discovery_sources.note: Jl. Raya Mas (Mas village, greater-Ubud). Contemporary/modern/tribal. Posts opening nights on IG. Separate Art Lounge (@tonyrakaartlounge).

discovery_sources.name: ARMA — Agung Rai Museum of Art
discovery_sources.note: Pengosekan, Ubud. Museum exhibitions + annual ARMA Fest (Sept). Ingest exhibitions + the festival; SKIP the nightly tourist dance shows (Kecak/Legong as standalone admission) unless a distinct special edition.

discovery_sources.name: Gaya Art Space / Gaya Ceramic Arts Centre
discovery_sources.note: Sayan (greater-Ubud). Monthly artist talks + ceramic exhibitions + residency showcases. Non-profit gallery register — on-brand.

discovery_sources.name: Purga Artspace
discovery_sources.note: Jl. Bisma, Ubud. Artist-run space + Littletalks bookshop + cafe. Irregular but genuine exhibition openings; participates in Ubud Open Studios.

discovery_sources.name: Ubud Organic Farmers Market
discovery_sources.note: Saturdays 9am-1pm, Jl. Raya Pengosekan. Already seeded as a recurring resident anchor. As a SOURCE here, surface only special editions / one-off maker markets — the weekly instance already lives in the feed (don't duplicate).

discovery_sources.name: Locavore NXT / Locavore events
discovery_sources.note: Ubud. Chef collabs, six-hands dinners, guest-chef takeovers — structurally one-off (the pairing never reassembles). Sharpest time-sensitivity in the discovery tier. First-party booking only.

discovery_sources.name: Bhakti Bliss Festival of Lights (Jeremy Sol)
discovery_sources.note: Annual 3-day bhakti festival at Kenran Resort, Tegallalang (~15min north of Ubud). Typically runs early August (2026 edition: Aug 7-9). Megatix-ticketed. BaliSpirit Festival sister event, running since 2022. Programme: Maha Bhakti Bliss Kirtan, ecstatic dance, cacao ceremony, sacred transmission satsang. Past headliners include Margot Anand. Early-bird tickets drop ~2 months out; lineup announced ~1 month out. ONE PARENT CARD — do not create per-session sub-events. First ingested 2026-06-15.

discovery_sources.name: Paradiso Ubud (performance / salons — NOT cinema)
discovery_sources.note: Cross-ref: Paradiso is also a core priority_a source for ecstatic dance. For DISCOVERY, surface its curated live-music / performance-art / salon nights. Cinema stays hard-rejected unless the tight Phase-4 panel/Q&A exception is met. Dedup against the core entry + any seeded events.

discovered_pending.name: Nuanu Creative City — informal CI jams
discovered_pending.note: User-reported (Mieka + Celina, 2026-06-01): informal contact-improv jams run at Nuanu on days Moksa Dojo / Paradiso aren't on. No fixed public schedule — announced in the Ubud CI Telegram (see competitor_harvest). Track for a concrete recurring slot once that Telegram scout is joined. Distinct from 'ASH at Nuanu', which we already track separately.

discovered_pending.name: Azadi Retreat
discovered_pending.note: Banjar Laplapan, Pejeng Kawan, Ubud (Laplapan area). Sleeps 20+, rice-field setting, Mt Agung views. Hosts visiting international artists — first seen via YUJOY ecstatic dance June 8. Track for future visiting artists / special events.

discovered_pending.name: Bara Studio @ Karma House
discovered_pending.note: Penestanan, Ubud (above Karma House Chai and Tattoo). Weekly Saturday Tantra Essence couples workshop ('Essence of Love') in Ananda Sarita lineage. 500k IDR/couple. Ticket Tailor: tickettailor.com/events/barastudio/1755020. At 2 qualifying logs (May 25 + Jun 15) — needs 1 more to promote to priority_b. Note: Bara Studio also hosts non-tantra Bachata workshops — filter those out. IG handle confirmed: @barabalistudio (sources.json instagram_handles corrected Jun 15).

discovered_pending.name: School of Unified Healing
discovered_pending.note: Confirmed venue: Jl. Subak Sok Wayah, Ubud, Kec. Tegallalang, Bali 80571 (confirmed 2026-06-04). Format: Bhakti Kirtan 5:30pm → dinner buffet 7pm (organic/local) → fire circle 8pm → close 9:30pm. IDR 220k presale / IDR 320k door. Two editions confirmed: Jul 6 (in DB) + Jun slug active (date unconfirmed; closest Sat to new moon Jun 15 = Jun 13/14). At 2 qualifying logs — needs 1 more for priority_b.

discovered_pending.name: Akasha New Earth Haven
discovered_pending.note: Eco-dome and bamboo pavilion retreat at Ubud's jungle edge, with organic gardens and natural swimming pool. Weekly Saturday Ecstatic Dance & Cacao Ceremony (6–10 PM) led by Karunika — opens with Vital Cacao Ceremony by fire, flows into ecstatic dance, closes with sound healing. SuperMoon editions add breathwork. On-site vegan restaurant. Fills the Saturday gap in our calendar. Candidate for priority_b after 2 more qualifying logs. Instagram handle not yet confirmed.

discovered_pending.name: Casa Curandera Bali
discovered_pending.note: Ubud area. Hosts recurring Saturday Afrobeats and tribal rhythm dance events with DJ Zaia Lynn. No confirmed June/July 2026 date surfaced — site blocks direct fetch. Venue identity (Casa Curandera = 'healer's house') suggests ceremony-adjacent space. Track for specific dates before promoting.

discovered_pending.name: Om Ham Retreat & Resort
discovered_pending.note: Central Ubud retreat hosting monthly lunar-aligned ceremonies: Purnima Sound Bath & Kirtan (full moon, singing bowls + devotional chanting) and Floating New Moon Sound Bath — both led by Sawitri (certified sound healing therapist). Recurring format on moon dates. Track for specific June/July 2026 dates before ingesting.

discovered_pending.name: ASH at Nuanu Creative City
discovered_pending.note: Performance / ritual space inside Nuanu Creative City (just south of Ubud). Hosted Mariama Del Mar's Five Temples of Her live ritual-dance performance (May 27). Surfaced via Blissbase competitor-harvest. Format leans concert/performance rather than participatory circle — verify each booking. At 1 qualifying log; needs 2 more.

discovered_pending.name: La Portal to Shamballah
discovered_pending.note: Vegetarian restaurant + events space in Peliatan, Ubud. Hosts weekly Wednesday Authenticity 'The Game' (free, authentic-relating format) and recurring Dabka Palestinian Dance. Surfaced via Soulwise competitor-harvest. Heart-opening / connection events, free entry. At 1 qualifying log; needs 2 more.

discovered_pending.name: Intuitive Flow Yogastudio — Penestanan (non-yoga events only)
discovered_pending.note: Penestanan yoga studio that also hosts a recurring Wednesday Shakti Bhakti Kirtan with Anu Karoliina + Friends (acoustic chanting, 200k IDR). Surfaced via Blissbase. Treat as a kirtan venue **only** — skip their yoga schedule (hard-reject).

discovered_pending.name: Sayuri Healing Food
discovered_pending.note: Established Ubud plant-based restaurant + event space (Jl. Sukma Kesuma No. 2, Peliatan, Kecamatan Ubud). Founded by Sayuri Tanaka (49K IG @sayuri_healing_food, BaliSpirit Festival presenter). Hosts weekly Thursday Kirtan: Mantra Medicine & Sacred Cacao (18:00) and weekly Sunday Kirtan with Vasudev (18:00) — called 'Ubud's most favourite Kirtan' by the community. Also hosts occasional ecstatic kirtan evenings and other ceremonies. Events page 403-blocked — walk in or check IG. At 1 qualifying log (May 28) — needs 2 more for priority_b. Events website also 403-blocked.

discovered_pending.name: Wu Wei Tea Temple
discovered_pending.note: **⚠ GEO-UNCONFIRMED (flagged 2026-06-13):** The domain wuweiteatemple.com was identified June 12 as a Ubud venue at 'Jl. Sriwedari, Ubud' hosting Fula Brothers June 13. However, multiple search agents on June 13 report this domain is owned by Wu Wei Tea Temple in Fairfax, California (1820 Sir Francis Drake Blvd, CA 94930). The Fula Brothers event in the approvals queue (source_url: wuweiteatemple.com/events/2026/6/13/fula-brothers) may be a California event misidentified as Ubud. Admin should geo-verify and potentially archive that pending event. If a legitimate Ubud tea venue named Wu Wei exists at Jl. Sriwedari, it is not indexed at this domain — investigate via IG or on-the-ground. Pause weekly walks of this URL until geo-identity is confirmed.

competitor_harvest.name: Blissbase
competitor_harvest.note: **API-DIRECT (preferred):** `curl -sS 'https://www.blissbase.app/__data.json'` returns a SvelteKit-encoded JSON payload of the rolling near-term Bali feed (default ~8 events per call, lat=-8.65593/lng=115.217, totalEvents currently ~51 in the 50km Denpasar radius). The payload's `events[].sourceUrl` IS the original Megatix / Eventbrite / WhatsApp / Ticket Tailor URL — that's the only field worth keeping. Decoder: `data = json['nodes'][1]['data']; root = data[0]; ev_ids = data[root['events']]`. Pagination beyond page 1 is currently unresolved (cookie-set page/limit/distance fields don't appear to take effect via the public endpoint); rely on daily polling of the rolling feed rather than backfilling. **Attribution rules apply** (see playbook): NEVER store a blissbase URL in source_url, external_ticket_url, or description. Recreate descriptions in our voice — blissbase descriptions often contain chakra-soup language. Primary value: surfacing new venues and facilitators in addition to direct events.

competitor_harvest.name: Soulwise
competitor_harvest.note: Built on Sharetribe — sitemap at `https://soulwise.io/sitemap-recent-listings.xml` exposes all ~393 listing UUIDs (each `https://soulwise.io/l/<uuid>` returns the SSR'd detail page; the JSON is inline `<script>` tags). Marketplace skews heavily yoga / kundalini / 1-on-1 sessions — most listings hard-reject. The Sharetribe Flex API (`flex-api.sharetribe.com`) requires an OAuth access token; not worth wiring up just for read access. Filter by Tantra / Dance / Ceremonies categories explicitly. **Attribution rules apply** — never store soulwise.io URLs. Outbound RSVP links inside listings point back to soulwise itself — strip them. Primary value: surfacing new venues (La Portal to Shamballah, the few non-yoga listings).

competitor_harvest.name: ToDo.Today — Ubud
competitor_harvest.note: **LIVE — harvested daily** (2026-06-02) via `scripts/scrape/todo-today-harvest.mjs` + `.github/workflows/todo-today-harvest.yml` (02:30 WITA) → POST `/api/cron/curator-ingest` with `source=todo-today` → pending. Stealthed headless Chromium passes the Cloudflare challenge on `/ubud/`, then calls the SPA's OWN JSON API from inside the page context (carries cf_clearance): `/api/todo-today/v1/events?channel=ubud` for today + `&event_date=tomorrow`. Returns `sections[].events[]` with name/image/venue/start_time/end_time/price_label/category_id/recurring_tooltip — no HTML parsing. ICP filter by category_id (keep 2 Dance / 4 Consciousness / 19 Tantra / 10 Relationships / 7 Music / 5 Arts; gate 1 Wellness / 6 Community / 9 Special on a positive keyword; drop the rest + a negative sweep for reformer/pilates/barre/food-tours). Yields ~12-15 ICP events/day, all with correct cover images. **Attribution:** never store todo.today URLs; `external_ticket_url` is null in v1 — the ticket-direct link (Momence/Megatix) lives on the detail page. **TODO(spider-web):** follow each event's detail sublink to capture that ticket URL AND promote the first-party organiser domain (e.g. alchemyyogacenter.com) into `discovered_pending`. Founder Eran. WhatsApp digest channel `https://chat.whatsapp.com/CWfNTaOyTvw0tgynXz7KRG` is an alt path.

competitor_harvest.name: ubud.app
competitor_harvest.note: Closest editorial competitor — same niche, same city, same handpicked register. Likely a one-person editorial curation operation (no /create or organiser portal visible). Apparently no public API or events JSON; the site is a small landing PWA with embedded content. Walk the landing page weekly via WebFetch / Playwright; primary value is observing their cadence and catching events that bypass our other sources. **Attribution rules apply** — never link or credit. Contact email is `hello@ubud.app`.

competitor_harvest.name: BaliSpirit — community events calendar
competitor_harvest.note: Incumbent calendar from the BaliSpirit Festival organisation (running since 2003). Covers all of Bali + Lombok/Gilis (filter for Ubud + Tegallalang + Penestanan + Pejeng). Seven broad buckets (free / festivals / food / music / ceremonies / wellness / movie). Low curation, high coverage — the opposite of our taste filter. Walk weekly via WebFetch; expect ~80%+ rejection rate but the ceremony + music buckets occasionally surface events the focused aggregators miss. **Attribution rules apply** (keep the original ticket URL if present; never reference balispirit.com).

competitor_harvest.name: AllEvents.in — Ubud
competitor_harvest.note: Global event aggregator with a city vertical for Ubud. Server-rendered HTML carries JSON-LD `<script type="application/ld+json">` Event schema — extract dates/venue/organiser from there; downstream ticket URL lives in `offers.url` when present. High noise (parties, networking, generic festivals) — vibe-filter aggressively. **Attribution rules apply** — never store an allevents.in URL anywhere on an event. Walk weekly.

competitor_harvest.name: BaliBuddies — events listings
competitor_harvest.note: Commercial Bali insider's-guide portal. Mostly festivals and tourism-adjacent events; expect low yield against our universe. Card CTAs occasionally expose downstream Megatix / Ticket Tailor / venue-site links — capture only those. **Attribution rules apply** — never store balibuddies.com URLs. Walk weekly; demote to monthly if yield stays at zero.

competitor_harvest.name: Cool Destinations — Ubud calendar
competitor_harvest.note: Affiliate/SEO calendar; most outbound links are affiliate-tagged (Booking.com, Klook, GetYourGuide) — strip those entirely. The festival-grade entries occasionally cite venue-direct ticketing — keep only those. **Attribution rules apply**. Walk monthly, not daily.

competitor_harvest.name: NOW! Bali — annual events
competitor_harvest.note: Glossy lifestyle magazine's annual events overview. Low frequency, high signal for festival-tier events (Bali Spirit Fest, Ubud Writers, Folk Fest, Open Studios). Refresh quarterly, not daily. **Attribution rules apply** — never store nowbali.co.id URLs.

competitor_harvest.name: NuMundo — Bali places
competitor_harvest.note: Global transformational-places directory. Places-first, not events-first — surface a new conscious centre/retreat venue, then check its place page for any listed upcoming events. Yield is low but venue-discovery value is high. Walk weekly for *new venues* (append to `discovered_pending`); only ingest events directly when a venue's own ticketing URL is exposed. **Attribution rules apply**.

competitor_harvest.name: Ubud Conscious Community (Facebook group)
competitor_harvest.note: ~25k-member community firehose — the actual social layer where Ubud's conscious scene posts events. High noise (housing posts, lost-cat posts, recommendation threads) but high signal when events appear. **Operational path:** route through the existing `facebook.ts` / `apify-instagram.ts` adapter pattern rather than the curator agent (curator can't auth into FB groups). Treat this source-list entry as the registration of the firehose; volume comes from the adapter pipeline. **Attribution rules apply** — never store facebook.com group URLs on events; capture only the downstream ticket URL the organiser posts.

competitor_harvest.name: Ubud Events (Facebook page)
competitor_harvest.note: Public Facebook page — easier to scrape than a closed group. Posts a mix of own-events and signal-boosts. Route through the existing `facebook.ts` adapter. **Attribution rules apply** — capture only downstream ticket URLs; never store facebook.com page URLs.

competitor_harvest.name: Ubud Dance Community (Facebook group)
competitor_harvest.note: Dance-vertical-only community. Lower volume than Ubud Conscious Community but very high signal-to-noise for our `Dance & Movement` category. Route through `facebook.ts` adapter. **Attribution rules apply**.

competitor_harvest.name: ShambAllah WhatsApp curator channel
competitor_harvest.note: **Highest-value scout we don't yet ingest.** Daily human-curated drop — admin only posts selected events per day (described publicly as 'free of clutter, admin only posts selected events every day'). This is the closest existing analogue to The Ubudian's own editorial register, so each post is essentially pre-filtered for our universe. **Operational path:** once Benji joins (provide invite link / channel ID), route through the existing `whatsapp.ts` WAHA adapter and treat the channel ID as a `priority_a`-grade source rather than a competitor. Until joined, this entry is a placeholder reminding the morning routine to chase the invite. **Attribution rules apply** — never store the WhatsApp invite URL on an event; capture only the downstream Megatix / Ticket Tailor / venue URL the curator pastes.

competitor_harvest.name: Ubud Contact Improv / Water Contact Telegram
competitor_harvest.note: **User-reported gap (Mieka, 2026-06-01; Celina posted an alt invite https://t.me/+g8AH2_HdzIdhNDli).** Telegram channel where Ubud's contact-improv community posts jams, classes and *water contact* sessions. Two users independently flagged that the informal Nuanu jams (run 'whenever Moksa Dojo isn't on') live here and are missing from our agenda — squarely our `Dance & Movement` ICP. **Operational path:** needs Benji to join from his phone (closed invite, same blocker as the ShambAllah WhatsApp channel), then route via a Telegram adapter with the bot as a member. Highest-value CI scout we don't yet ingest. **Attribution rules apply** — never store the t.me invite on an event.

competitor_harvest.name: Brazilian Zouk / Latin socials WhatsApp (Ubud)
competitor_harvest.note: **User-reported (Celina, 2026-06-01). Promoted to CORE ICP by Benji 2026-06-10** — partner-dance socials (Brazilian zouk, salsa/bachata, Latin, fusion) now ingest as core `Dance & Movement` with the `partner-dance` vibe tag (CREMOSO at Bara precedent). Route via the WAHA WhatsApp adapter once joined — **still blocked on Benji joining the group from his phone** (same blocker as ShambAllah + CI Telegram). Until then, watch for zouk/Latin socials surfacing via ToDo.Today and venue scouts. **Attribution rules apply**.

rejected_permanent.name: PURNAMA Full Moon Dance Ritual
rejected_permanent.note: Venue confirmed as Jl. Pura Kramat, Cemagi, Kec. Mengwi, Bali 80351 — the southwest Bali coast near Canggu/Seseh, ~25km from Ubud. Definitively outside greater-Ubud. 22 consecutive curator skips (first flagged 2026-06-09). Format was compelling (cacao+dance+sound by Shiva/Todjon/Chris Fox) but venue disqualifies. Admin should archive any pending PURNAMA events in DB.

facilitators_pending.name: Raio (Rob Weber)
events_seen: Full Moon Cacao Ceremony — The Yoga Barn
facilitators_pending.note: Medicine man, sound healer, musician. Runs monthly full moon (Abuela Luna) ceremonies at Yoga Barn. Well-known in Ubud scene. BaliSpirit Festival presenter.

facilitators_pending.name: Jada Jane Boh
events_seen: Moving Waves 5Rhythms — Paradiso Ubud (weekly Tue 15:00–17:00, confirmed 2026)
facilitators_pending.note: 5Rhythms certified facilitator. Co-runs Moving Waves at Paradiso with Sophie Daubisse. Schedule confirmed active through at least July 28, 2026. IDR 150k drop-in / IDR 600k 5-class pass. Source: 5rhythms.com official class listing.

facilitators_pending.name: Sophie Daubisse
events_seen: Moving Waves 5Rhythms — Paradiso Ubud (weekly Tue 15:00–17:00)
facilitators_pending.note: Co-facilitates Moving Waves 5Rhythms at Paradiso with Jada Jane Boh. No individual IG handle found. Confirmed on 5rhythms.com official class listing.

facilitators_pending.name: Emmalee Bevan
events_seen: Dance of the Dragonfly — Dragonfly Village
Dance of the Dragonfly Expanded Launch — Dragonfly Village (Jul 23)
facilitators_pending.note: Co-leads somatic dance ritual at Dragonfly Village with Ritual Beats. Resident facilitator. Expanded format launches July 23 with sauna/fire circle.

facilitators_pending.name: Bhakti Bliss Bali (Jeremy Sol)
events_seen: New Moon Kirtan & Sacred Tea — Dragon Tea Temple (Jun 25)
Full Moon Kirtan & Sacred Tea — Dragon Tea Temple (Jun 15)
Solstice Kirtan, Cacao & Fire Ritual — AYMC (Jun 21)
facilitators_pending.note: Confirmed anchor facilitator in the Ubud devotional scene — 3 events across Dragon Tea Temple and AYMC (weekly maintenance 2026-05-24). Format: kirtan + ecstatic dance + sound healing + fire ritual. Founder of Bhakti Bliss Bali. Also runs recurring monthly Full Moon Bhakti Celebration at AYMC (no confirmed July date yet). Track for AYMC full moon editions.

facilitators_pending.name: YUJOY
events_seen: Ecstatic Dance with DJ YUJOY — Azadi Retreat (Jun 8)
facilitators_pending.note: International ecstatic dance DJ and musician. 20+ tracks. Multi-genre: electronic/folk/ethnic/hip-hop/soul/funk. Touring artist. Site: yujoy.io. Visiting artist not resident.

facilitators_pending.name: Katya Reihan + Sean Goldberg (DJ Goldie)
events_seen: ECSTANTRIC DANCE — Lodtunduh, Ubud (Sep 7)
facilitators_pending.note: Run ECSTANTRIC DANCE, a tantra flow + ecstatic dance fusion format. Experts in tantra, yoga, meditation. Based in Bali. Distinct offering — track for future June/July editions.

facilitators_pending.name: Dharmaraj
events_seen: Awakening the Heart — Swasti Eco Cottages (Aug 23-24)
facilitators_pending.note: Decades in tantric, Osho, and embodiment traditions. Runs 2-day retreats at Swasti Eco Cottages, Ubud. Linktr.ee profile: linktr.ee/Dharma.Raj. Contact: dharmarajawakens@gmail.com / WA +62-813-3725-3380.

facilitators_pending.name: Steven Light & Valentina
events_seen: New Moon Bhakti Kirtan — School of Unified Healing (Jul 6)
facilitators_pending.note: Run New Moon Bhakti Kirtan at School of Unified Healing, Jl. Subak Sok Wayah, Ubud, Kec. Tegallalang (confirmed 2026-06-04). facilitators_pending.name: Onanya Nicho (Rey Rao)
events_seen: Onanya Icaros — Dragon Tea Temple (Jun 26, 2026)
facilitators_pending.note: Amazonian plant medicine artist and musician. Decade-long apprenticeship in traditional Amazonian plant medicine; initiated as an Onanya (Shipibo: 'one who knows the plants') by Maestra Estela Pangoza and her family at Aya Madre Healing Center. Also received transmissions from Lakota Sundancers and Navajo Diné Roadmen. Prior Dragon Tea Temple appearances confirmed: `onanya-temple-of-sound` and `onanya-sound-ceremony` slugs exist, making Jun 26 at least his 3rd DTT appearance — reliable returning visiting artist. Website: onanyanicho.com. No IG handle confirmed yet. Format: live-looping icaros ceremony — unrepeatable soundscape shaped by the moment and energy in the space.
